summary: M2 JSONL → PostgreSQL backfill runner delivered with idempotent upsert, parity report, and rollback instructions. Reads evidence manifest (M1-0102) and writes mirror rows into the 8 evidence-lake tables (M2-0201) via the repository adapter (M2-0202). Default is dry-run; --apply gated on SANGUO_RAG_PG_DSN. Smoke test asserts row count parity, re-run idempotency, and zero modification of JSONL artifacts.

artifacts.description: Reads EvidenceManifest, groups entries by (table, sourceId), coerces JSONL rows into PG-shaped dicts (handles harvested_pages, evidence_seeds, evidence_cards, anchor_passages, proposal_ledger), rolls up source_runs, returns parity report with JSONL count/sha256 vs PG written/skipped/errors.
17 assertions: parity report covers all 6 evidence tables + pipeline_runs + source_runs, JSONL row counts match PG requested counts, re-run reports identical counts, JSONL artifacts untouched.
Sample parity report showing schemaVersion=backfill-parity-report.v0.1, all parityOk=true, dryRun=true, guards listing jsonl-canonical-export-not-modified.

Three rollback modes: A) single-run delete via pipeline_runs cascade; B) drop tables + re-apply schema + re-backfill; C) DROP SCHEMA CASCADE last resort. All preserve JSONL canonical and require post-rollback governance regression.

acceptanceMapping.criterion: dry-run backfill from artifact manifest into PostgreSQL mirror
acceptanceMapping.evidence: backfill_evidence_to_postgres.py default --dry-run; smoke test passes mode=postgres dry_run=True.

acceptanceMapping.criterion: idempotent upsert, re-run produces no duplicates
acceptanceMapping.evidence: Adapter uses ON CONFLICT (per _PG_UPSERT_TEMPLATES); smoke test re-runs backfill and asserts identical row counts.

acceptanceMapping.criterion: JSONL count/hash vs PostgreSQL count/hash parity report
acceptanceMapping.evidence: Parity report items contain jsonlRowCount + jsonlSha256 + pgRequested + pgWritten + pgSkippedDuplicate + pgErrors + parityOk.

acceptanceMapping.criterion: rollback/truncate plan with no JSONL modification
acceptanceMapping.evidence: backfill-rollback-instructions.zh-TW.md modes A/B/C; smoke test asserts SHA256 of every JSONL fixture is unchanged after backfill.

nextActions: SANGUO-RAGOPS-0204: parity gate integrates this backfill report into governance regression
SANGUO-RAGOPS-0301: vector exporter can resolve evidence_card and anchor_passage rows from the same manifest
